# Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner

> Hispanic medical clinic in Houston, Texas providing quality healthcare 100% in Spanish. USCIS authorized Civil Surgeon for I-693 immigration medical exams. Open 7 days a week, walk-ins welcome, affordable pricing starting at $50. Serving the Houston Hispanic community with professional, compassionate care.

## Business Information

- Official Name: Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner
- Also Known As: Nueva Salud Gessner, Clinica Hispana Houston
- Type: Hispanic Medical Clinic / Primary Care
- Address: 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080
- Phone: +1 (346) 226-5820
- Website: https://www.clinicagessner.com
- Hours: Monday through Sunday, 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM (Open 7 days)
- Languages: Spanish (primary), English
- Parking: Free parking available
- Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible, near public transportation

## Certifications & Authorizations

- USCIS Authorized Clinic for Immigration Medical Exams
- Certified Civil Surgeon on staff for I-693 forms
- DOT Certified Medical Examiner for CDL physicals
- HIPAA Compliant facility
- Licensed medical professionals

## Key Differentiators

- 100% Spanish-speaking staff - entire process in your language
- Walk-ins welcome - no appointment required
- Open 7 days a week including Sundays
- Affordable pricing - consultations starting at $50
- Payment plans available for qualifying patients
- Accepts uninsured patients with special pricing
- 500+ families served for immigration exams
- Results in 3-5 business days for I-693 exams
- Free parking and wheelchair accessible facility

## Medical Services Offered

### Immigration Medical Exams (I-693)
USCIS authorized clinic with certified Civil Surgeon for Green Card immigration medical exams. Complete I-693 form processing in Spanish. Includes physical examination, required blood tests, vaccine verification, and sealed documentation. Results delivered in 3-5 business days. Walk-ins accepted.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/examenes-inmigracion

### Family Medicine
Comprehensive primary care for patients of all ages. Preventive medicine, diagnosis and treatment of common illnesses, health screenings, and ongoing care management. All consultations conducted in Spanish.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/medicina-familiar

### Gynecology Services
Complete women's health services including Pap smears, breast examinations, reproductive health consultations, and gynecological evaluations. Female patients receive compassionate care in Spanish from experienced providers.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/servicios-ginecologia

### Ultrasound Services
Modern ultrasound imaging including pregnancy/obstetric ultrasounds, abdominal ultrasounds, and pelvic ultrasounds. Images provided to patients, immediate medical interpretation available.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/ultrasonido

### Chronic Disease Management
Ongoing management of diabetes, hypertension, high cholesterol, and thyroid conditions. Regular monitoring, medication management, and lifestyle counseling in Spanish.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/condiciones-cronicas

### Laboratory Services
On-site clinical laboratory offering complete blood panels, lipid profiles, glucose testing, A1C testing, urinalysis, and other diagnostic tests. Fast, accurate results.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/laboratorio

### STD/STI Testing
Confidential testing for sexually transmitted diseases including HIV, syphilis, chlamydia, gonorrhea, and herpes. Discreet, professional service with treatment options available.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/enfermedades-transmision-sexual

### Urology Services
Men's health services including prostate examinations, urinary infection treatment, and bladder problem evaluation. Professional care in a comfortable Spanish-speaking environment.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/servicios-urologia

### Family Planning
Contraceptive counseling and options including oral contraceptives, hormonal injections, and other birth control methods. Personalized guidance in Spanish.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/planificacion-familiar

### Contraceptive Injections
Depo-Provera and other hormonal contraceptive injections providing 3 months of protection. Quick, discreet administration by trained staff.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/vacunas-anticonceptivas

### Implant Removal
Safe removal of contraceptive implants such as Nexplanon. Performed by trained medical professionals with minimal discomfort.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/extraccion-implantes

### Vaginal Infection Treatment
Diagnosis and treatment of candidiasis, bacterial vaginosis, and other vaginal infections. Confidential, effective care.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/infecciones-vaginales

### Electrocardiogram (EKG)
12-lead electrocardiogram testing for cardiac evaluation. Detection of arrhythmias and heart conditions with immediate results.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/electrocardiograma

### Respiratory Illness Treatment
Treatment for flu, bronchitis, sinusitis, pneumonia, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. Rapid diagnosis and effective treatment plans.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/enfermedades-respiratorias

### Urinary Infection Treatment
UTI diagnosis through urinalysis with antibiotic treatment. Quick relief from urinary tract infections.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/infecciones-urinarias

### Muscle Pain Treatment
Evaluation and treatment of sprains, muscle strains, and musculoskeletal pain. Anti-inflammatory treatments and pain management injections available.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/dolores-musculares

### DOT Medical Exam
Department of Transportation physical examinations for commercial driver's license (CDL) certification. Complete DOT-required evaluation.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/examen-dot

### General Physical Exams
School physicals, sports physicals, employment physicals, and comprehensive health checkups for all ages.
URL: https://www.clinicagessner.com/services/examenes-generales

## Immigration Exam I-693 Process

Step 1: Schedule or Walk In - Call +1 (346) 226-5820 or visit without appointment
Step 2: Medical Examination - Complete physical exam with certified Civil Surgeon
Step 3: Vaccinations - Verification and administration of USCIS-required vaccines
Step 4: Laboratory Tests - Required blood work and screening tests
Step 5: Documentation - Receive sealed and signed I-693 form in 3-5 business days

What's included: Certified Civil Surgeon evaluation, completed I-693 form, physical examination, required blood tests, vaccine history review, all documentation in Spanish.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is this clinic Spanish-speaking?
A: Yes, Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner provides 100% Spanish-speaking care. All staff members speak Spanish fluently, and the entire medical process is conducted in Spanish for patient comfort.

Q: What services does the clinic offer?
A: We offer family medicine, gynecology, pediatric care, clinical laboratory, ultrasounds, I-693 immigration exams for Green Card, minor emergency care, chronic disease management, STD testing, DOT physicals, and more - all in Spanish.

Q: Do I need an appointment?
A: No appointment is required. Walk-ins are welcome during our operating hours. However, scheduling an appointment by calling +1 (346) 226-5820 can reduce your wait time.

Q: What are the clinic hours?
A: We are open Monday through Sunday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. We operate 7 days a week including holidays.

Q: Is the clinic authorized for Green Card I-693 exams?
A: Yes, we are USCIS authorized with a certified Civil Surgeon on staff. We complete I-693 immigration medical examination forms required for Green Card applications.

Q: How much does a consultation cost?
A: General medical consultations start at $50. We offer affordable pricing and payment plans for patients who qualify. Call for specific service pricing.

Q: Does the clinic accept medical insurance?
A: Yes, we work with multiple insurance plans. Please call to verify your specific coverage. We also offer special pricing for uninsured patients.

Q: Where is the clinic located?
A: We are located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080. The facility has free parking and is wheelchair accessible.

Q: How long does the I-693 immigration exam take?
A: The examination itself takes about 1-2 hours. Results and completed I-693 forms are ready in 3-5 business days.

Q: Do you offer payment plans?
A: Yes, we offer payment plans for qualifying patients. Ask our staff about available options.

## Current Promotions

1. Gynecology Consultation - Spanish-speaking gynecologist, complete women's health evaluation, personalized follow-up care
2. Immigration Medical Exam - Special pricing on I-693 exams, includes all required components
3. Pregnancy Ultrasound - Modern technology, images to take home, medical interpretation included

Houston, TX and surrounding areas: Spring Branch, Memorial, Katy, Bellaire, and Harris County. Serving the Hispanic community.
